title: Fishmarket in Venice (Or... The Fish Merchant of Venice 😊)
tags: fishmarket fish shopper shopping customer market produce artificiallighting lighting local wellingtons wellingtonboots boots ice venice veneto italy italia mercatodelpescealminuto pesce mercato seafood fishmerchant merchant merchantofvenice fishmerchantofvenice opera themerchantofvenice shakespeare shakespeariancomedy play antonio portia shylock williamshakespeare humor humour flood flooding
description: The Fish Merchant of Venice 😊 ...  A Tale (tail?) of Daily life in Venice where the locals and merchants are not tourists and have to sell, or shop for and buy, their food locally. 😊   Perhaps this is a modern day Antonio and Portia discussing Shylock's demands? 🤔😊 On a more serious note, you can tell this lady is a local from the elegant wellington boots she is wearing to help navigate the serious flooding that often occurs in Venice.

title: SmallTownVenezia
tags: nikon nikonphotographer italia nikond7100 nikonphoto travelphotography nikonphotography home venice italy venezia boats travel notourists locals local boat homes real water canal dorsoduro
description: This photo was taken in Venezia, Italy in the Dorsoduro, which is a part of the island which is home to less tourists but more real Venetians.  These beautiful, weathered buildings are people's homes.  The boats in the canal are not to ferry tourists around but how locals run their errands.  I think it is good to step back and realize people live in the places that tourists see as just a temporary destination for them.
